sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) 2Sa 17:20, מִיכַל הַמַּיִם a little stream of water (from the root מָכַל, Arab. مَكَل to contain a little water, as a well).

(2) [Michal], pr.n. of a daughter of Saul, the wife of David, 1Sa 14:49 19:11 , seq.; 2Sa 6:16, seq. This latter appears to be contracted from מִיכָאֵל which see.
